About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data shows **LINC dominating the long-term momentum rankings with a score of 94.2**, driven by exceptional 10-year returns of 1,478.91% and consistent outperformance versus SPY (+1,250.78% over 10 years), QQQ, and gold. The stock passes all four momentum ratio thresholds and trades above all major moving averages, triggering a "strong_buy" signal with clean momentum and normal volatility. In contrast, **CF ranks second with a 72.66% 1-year return but shows concerning weakness in longer timeframes**—its 10-year return of 294.5% significantly lags LINC, and it has actually underperformed QQQ by 159.72% over the past decade, suggesting the rally may be cyclical rather than secular. Both stocks maintain positioning above their 200-day averages and correlate most strongly with materials and industrials sectors, indicating their momentum is driven by similar economic drivers rather than isolated strength.
